name: Harvest Spice Tea Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Bring water to a boil in a saucepan and steep tea bags for 3 to 5 minutes, discarding them after squeezing out excess liquid.
3. Mix remaining ingredients in a large bowl.
4. Add steeped tea into the batter; blend well.
5. Pour batter into an 8x8x2-inch greased baking dish.
6. Bake for 25 minutes.
7. Serve warm with butter and sprinkled nutmeg, topped with Harvest Spice whipped cream.
